content: Phase 1: Run POC, fix until all 5 checks pass
Phase 2: Call design_agent for phoenix/fire theme guidelines
Phase 2: Backend implementation (models, database, services, routers, worker, server.py)
Phase 2: Frontend implementation (all pages + components matching screenshots)
Phase 2: All 12 user stories covered end-to-end
Phase 3: Fix all bugs reported by testing agent
